image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about latent TB than social media does.
Context visual: Latent tuberculosis, or latent TB, hides in your body without symptoms, yet it can reactivate.
Escalation visual: Many think it’s harmless, but it can lead to active TB if left untreated.
Evidence visual: Studies suggest about 10% of those with latent TB will develop active disease.
Payoff visual: Understanding latent TB is crucial for prevention, especially for vulnerable groups.
Cta visual: Want more science clarity? Hit subscribe and stay informed!
